description: Read the tuning specification at ~/Desktop/broadcast_interface_spec.txt. Modify the existing 'GigabitEthernet' interface template's Rx and Tx Utilization Critical thresholds to 90. Then, create a new interface template named 'Broadcast-Video-Tunnel' with description 'SMPTE-2110-Transport', Rx and Tx Utilization Critical thresholds set to 95, and Errors/Discards Critical threshold set to 1. Application: http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123).
